columns.extraction_plan: Extract the regimen for the experimental arm. The abstract states: "Patients with metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer were randomly assigned to darolutamide or placebo plus androgen-deprivation therapy and docetaxel." The Methods section on page 2 further specifies: "Enrolled patients were randomly assigned (1:1) to oral darolutamide 600 mg twice daily or matched placebo, in combination with ADT and docetaxel." Therefore, Treatment Arm 1 Regimen is: "oral darolutamide 600 mg twice daily in combination with ADT and docetaxel".
